503.description: The Health Check is not successful

post.summary: Upload une image de produit depuis le connector
post.description: Endpoint appelé par le script exécuté dans le connector pour uploader les images des produits. Le clientId est extrait du token JWT pour des raisons de sécurité. Accepte les données en base64 (JSON) depuis nodeFetch.
Endpoint appelé par le script exécuté dans le connector pour uploader l'avatar du compte. Le clientId est extrait du token JWT. Accepte les données en base64 (JSON) depuis nodeFetch.

post.summary: Sauvegarde les informations du client WhatsApp
post.description: Endpoint appelé par le script pour sauvegarder les informations du compte WhatsApp Business.
Endpoint appelé par le script pour sauvegarder le catalogue complet avec les collections et produits.
Endpoint appelé par le script pour supprimer les images qui ne sont plus dans le catalogue WhatsApp. Supprime les fichiers de Minio et les entrées de la BD.
Triggers full catalog sync: backend (via connector) + whatsapp-agent (local with embeddings). Updates lastCatalogSyncedAt.

get.description: Retourne toutes les collections avec leurs produits et les produits non catégorisés.

200.description: Returns the WhatsApp agent for the current user

404.description: WhatsApp agent not found for this user

post.summary: Provision a WhatsApp agent for the current user

409.description: WhatsApp agent already exists for this user

200.description: Returns the health status of the agent

get.summary: Get all WhatsApp labels for current user

post.summary: Validate if a phone number exists on WhatsApp
Check if agent can process a message
post.description: Called by whatsapp-agent service to check if a message should be processed and get agent context + authorized groups

201.description: Returns processing decision and agent configuration

post.summary: Log an agent operation with full metrics
post.description: Called by whatsapp-agent service to log conversations with tokens, tools, and duration metrics

get.description: Returns onboarding thread with messages and current score

post.description: Sends a user message and triggers AI response. Returns 202 Accepted. Response will be sent via WebSocket.
Marks onboarding as completed and activates the user. Requires score >= 80%.

post.summary: Request pairing code or check connection
post.description: Request a pairing code to link WhatsApp account with the application. If the account is already connected, an OTP will be sent instead. For desktop devices, returns a QR scenario.

message.example: Un code de vérification a été envoyé

post.description: Request a QR code to link WhatsApp account with the application (desktop)

message.example: Scannez le code QR avec WhatsApp

400.description: Bad request - QR code not available

post.description: Request a new QR code when the current one expires. This will restart the connector to generate a fresh QR code.
Verify that WhatsApp pairing was successful (called by webhook from connector)

post.summary: Confirm pairing completion or verify OTP
post.description: Called by frontend to confirm pairing (new device) or verify OTP code (existing connection). The endpoint automatically detects which scenario to handle based on the presence of an OTP in cache.

400.description: WhatsApp connection not yet confirmed / OTP code required but not provided

401.description: Invalid or expired pairing token / Invalid OTP code

post.description: Verify OTP code and complete login

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user information

post.summary: Import WhatsApp Business data for current user

404.description: WhatsApp agent not found for this user

get.summary: Get all products for current user
Get all orders for current user

post.summary: Webhook appelé quand WhatsApp se connecte
post.description: Endpoint appelé par le whatsapp-connector quand le client WhatsApp est prêt

post.summary: Webhook pour tous les events WhatsApp
post.description: Endpoint appelé par le whatsapp-connector pour tous les events (qr, authenticated, etc.)

info.title: Monorepo API
info.description: Interractive documentation for the Monorepo API

status.description: The new status of the agent

testPhoneNumbers.description: Phone numbers for test mode (AI only responds to these)

testLabels.description: Label names for test mode (AI only responds to contacts with these labels)

labelsToNotReply.description: Label names to exclude in production mode (AI will not respond to contacts with these labels)

productionEnabled.description: Enable production mode for the AI agent

message.example: Bonjour, je voudrais commander un produit

allowed.description: Whether the agent can process this message

userMessage.example: Bonjour, je voudrais commander un produit

agentResponse.example: Bonjour ! Je vais vous aider avec votre commande.

pairingToken.description: The pairing token received when requesting the pairing code

otpCode.description: OTP code if this is an OTP login scenario (required when scenario is "otp")

productsImported.description: Number of products imported from catalog

description.example: Latest iPhone model with advanced features
Latest iPhone model with advanced features

isVisible.description: Whether the metadata is visible to customers

description.example: We provide quality products and services

requiresProof.description: Whether proof of transfer is required
